text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The Arima Kinen is here, and an<n>unexpected visitor
shows up in the<n>waiting room while Narita Taishin
is<n>away.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
It's Narita Taishin's mother who,<n>after telling me
of her complicated<n>relationship with her daughter,
entrusts me with a bouquet of<n>flowers.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
When Narita Taishin returns, I tell her<n>the flowers
are from a fan, but she<n>immediately sees through
the lie.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
She tells me that she doesn't care<n>whether or not
her mother is<n>watching.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: She'll simply run, like she always<n>does, and win.
